== Notes for [[Item:Q100107|Q100107]] ==

'''Jewish Self-Government in Medieval Egypt: The Origins of the Office of the Head of the Jews, Ca. 1065-1126''' by Mark R. Cohen, Publisher Princeton University Press, 2014, See pages 138-145, ISBN 1400853583, 9781400853588

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7B60871EFBBFA9822EF79916C4F60
geni:6000000035050769680

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
